articles.title: A 5.3-million-year-old deep-sea whale necropolis in the Diamantina Zone - Nature
articles.description: Researchers uncovered an enormous deep-sea accumulation of whale remains in the southeastern Indian Ocean, showing long-term, specialized ecosystems and an extensive fossil record that offers new insight into deep-ocean biodiversity and whale evolutionary his…
